title: erigeron angustatus
intro: Erigeron angustatus, also known as narrow-leaved fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is commonly used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron angustatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Erigeron angustatus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use, making it a versatile and useful medicinal plant.
